title: Gentle Picking
description: Lets you pick up flowers and mushrooms with a right-click!
body:
A simple mod which lets you pick up flowers or mushrooms with a right click! Requested by MoonlitLamps.

 

Blocks that can be 'picked' are decided by the `gentlepicking:pickable` block tag.

 

This mod is for Fabric! It requires Fabric API.
